server/src/image_tool/cli/main.py :: _build_edits
def _build_edits(args: argparse.Namespace) -> EditOptions | None:
    edits = EditOptions(
        crop_x=args.crop_x,
        crop_y=args.crop_y,
        crop_width=args.crop_w,
        crop_height=args.crop_h,
        resize_width=args.resize_w,
        resize_height=args.resize_h,
        filter_name=args.filter or "none",
        post_filter=args.post_filter or "none",
    )
    if (
        edits.has_crop()
        or edits.resize_width
        or edits.resize_height
        or edits.filter_name != "none"
        or edits.post_filter != "none"
    ):
        return edits
    return None

server/src/image_tool/cli/main.py :: cmd_convert
def cmd_convert(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    input_path = Path(args.input)
    try:
        data, source_name = _read_input(input_path)
    except (FileNotFoundError, ValueError) as error:
        print(str(error), file=sys.stderr)
        return 1
    edits = _build_edits(args)
    try:
        output_bytes, target = convert_image(
            data,
            source_name,
            args.format,
            max_mb=args.max_mb,
            edits=edits,
            strip_metadata=not args.keep_metadata,
            apply_orientation=not args.no_orientation,
            preset_name=args.preset,
        )
    except ConversionError as error:
        print(str(error), file=sys.stderr)
        return 1 if error.status_code < 500 else 2

    output_path = _resolve_output_path(input_path, Path(args.output) if args.output else None, target.extension)
    output_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    output_path.write_bytes(output_bytes)
    print(f"Wrote {output_path} ({len(output_bytes):,} bytes)")
    return 0

server/src/image_tool/cli/main.py :: cmd_compare
def cmd_compare(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    left_path = Path(args.left)
    right_path = Path(args.right)
    try:
        left_data, left_name = _read_input(left_path)
        right_data, right_name = _read_input(right_path)
        report = compare_image_pair(left_data, left_name, right_data, right_name)
    except (FileNotFoundError, ValueError, ConversionError) as error:
        print(str(error), file=sys.stderr)
        return 1

    if args.json:
        print(json.dumps(report, indent=2))
        return 0

    print(report["summary"])
    print(f"MSE: {report['mse']}  PSNR: {report['psnr']}  SSIM: {report['ssim']}")
    print(f"Quality: {report['quality']}")
    return 0

server/src/image_tool/cli/main.py :: cmd_presets
def cmd_presets(_args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    print(json.dumps({"presets": list_presets()}, indent=2))
    return 0

def cmd_batch(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    try:
        input_paths = _collect_input_paths(args.inputs, recursive=args.recursive)
    except (FileNotFoundError, ValueError) as error:
        print(str(error), file=sys.stderr)
        return 1
    output_dir = Path(args.output)
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    edits = _build_edits(args)
    failures = 0
    for input_path in input_paths:
        data, source_name = _read_input(input_path)
        try:
            output_bytes, target = convert_image(
                data,
                source_name,
                args.format,
                max_mb=args.max_mb,
                edits=edits,
                strip_metadata=not args.keep_metadata,
                apply_orientation=not args.no_orientation,
                preset_name=args.preset,
            )
        except ConversionError as error:
            print(f"{input_path.name}: {error}", file=sys.stderr)
            failures += 1
            continue

        output_path = output_dir / f"{input_path.stem}.{target.extension}"
        output_path.write_bytes(output_bytes)

server/src/image_tool/cli/main.py :: _add_edit_arguments
def _add_edit_arguments(parser: argparse.ArgumentParser) -> None:
    parser.add_argument("--crop-x", type=int, default=None, help="Crop origin X")
    parser.add_argument("--crop-y", type=int, default=None, help="Crop origin Y")
    parser.add_argument("--crop-w", type=int, default=None, help="Crop width")
    parser.add_argument("--crop-h", type=int, default=None, help="Crop height")
    parser.add_argument("--resize-w", type=int, default=None, help="Resize width")
    parser.add_argument("--resize-h", type=int, default=None, help="Resize height")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--filter",
        choices=["none", "grayscale", "sepia", "invert", "warm", "cool"],
        default="none",
        help="Color filter applied before compression",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--post-filter",
        choices=["none", "blur", "sharpen"],
        default="none",
        help="Finish filter applied after compression",
    )

        prog="image0-1",
        description="Convert, analyze, and batch-compress images from the command line.",
    )
    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest="command", required=True)

    convert_parser = subparsers.add_parser("convert", help="Convert a single image")

    convert_parser.add_argument(
        "-f",
        "--format",
        choices=["jpg", "jpeg", "png", "gif", "webp", "pdf"],
        help="Output format (optional when --preset is used)",

            "email",
            "social",
            "thumbnail",
            "archive",
            "print",
            "gif-safe",
            "document",
        ],
        help="Named compression preset",
    )
